title: Variable Types
description:
Java is a strongly-typed language. Each variable must be declared with its type.

Fix the variable declarations so the code compiles. The program should print the person's info.
objectives: Use proper type for each value
hints: Strings use 'String', whole numbers use 'int', decimals use 'double', true/false use 'boolean'.
String literals need double quotes, char uses single quotes.
